entry.title: Re: notification and subscription for security notes
entry.content:
To receive notifications for security notes, please refer to the KBA below: 

2478289 - How to set up notifications for new or updated SAP Notes and/or KBAs with Expert Search filters - SAP for Me
If you wish to receive notifications about security notes that pertain to the Priority as "Correction with high priority" under the component indicated in 3567974, then you can set a filter as shown below.

Components (Exact) :BC-XS-APR 
Priority: Correction with high priority
Document Type: SAP Security Notes

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us. 

BR 
Judy

entry.title: Re: SAP service and asset manager more information about GIS
entry.content:
Question 1: I am not sure where you see this, but in the latest demo, you can only create polyline and polygon for Functional Location from Map. We only support line and polygon for both technical objects.

 

Question 2: No, there is no difference in the icon when an equipment is associated with the order or without. You can customize the client and have different icons.

Question 3: You can only enhance the icons and anything related to metadata. Any changes that require native extension changes are not possible.

Question 4: In terms of visualization, there is no difference between GEF vs GIS. There are some differences in terms of backend support etc but nothing from client side.

entry.title: Enhancing User Experience with SAP BI Launchpad - New Features Overview (BI2025 Release)
entry.content:
Enhancing User Experience with SAP BI Launch Pad  - New Features Overview (BI2025 Release)

The SAP BI Launchpad continues to evolve, offering enhanced user experiences with the latest BI2025 release. Here are detailed insights into the key improvements and new features introduced:

1. Columns Customization

With the BO25 release, users can now customize table views extensively. New columns have been introduced, and users have the flexibility to manage these using the Settings button. Columns displayed are context-sensitive:

  • Instance Pages: Columns relevant to instances.
  • Folder Pages: Columns specific to folder content.

Users can:

  • Reorder or sort columns based on personal preference.
  • Save changes persistently, even after logging off, by navigating to either the Home or Back option.

These customizations are user-driven and no longer governed solely by administrator settings, unlike previous releases.

2. Displaying Numbers on Tiles (Inbox and Recycle Bin)

The BI Launchpad Home page now prominently displays numeric indicators:

  • Inbox: Clearly shows unread messages, with the tile refreshing at regular intervals.
  • Recycle Bin: Indicates the number of documents currently in the bin, making content management straightforward.

3. Last Login Time

To enhance security and transparency, BI2025 displays a toast notification showing the user's last login time. This information is also accessible via:

  • Settings → User Information

4. Duplicate Content Feature

Users can effortlessly duplicate existing content directly within the BI Launchpad. This feature requires users to have "Copy" and "Paste" rights, ensuring secure and controlled content replication.

5. New Horizon Themes

BI Launchpad introduces visually appealing "Horizon" themes. These themes modernize the user interface, offering a refreshed and intuitive visual experience.

 

 

6. Disabling the "Everyone" Group

To enhance report-sharing security, administrators can now disable the "Everyone" group, reducing unintended distribution:

Steps to Configure:

 

Stop Tomcat Server.
Open the file FioriBI.properties located in:
<BOE_INSTALL_FOLDER>/tomcat/webapps/BOE/WEB-INF/config/default, or
<BOE_INSTALL_FOLDER>/tomcat/webapps/BOE/WEB-INF/config/custom
Set property BILP.allowSelection.everyoneGroup to true or false.
Restart Tomcat.

 

7. Hiding the "Web Assistant" Feature

Administrators can hide the Web Assistant feature to prevent potential disruptions in environments without internet connectivity:

Steps to Configure:

 

Stop Tomcat Server.
Open FioriBI.properties file as mentioned above.
Set property webassistant.enabled to true or false.
Restart Tomcat.

 

 

Administrative Enhancements for BI Launch Pad Managed via Central Management Console (CMC)

1. Additional Column Options in Preferences

Administrators gain flexibility to manage instance-related columns visible to end-users within Fiori BI Launchpad Preferences. Columns such as Submission Time, Completion Time, and Expiry can be enabled or disabled as needed, providing greater administrative control.

2. Admin Control Over User Preferences

End-user changes to BI Launchpad preferences now require administrator consent. Administrators can enable an override setting in CMC, disabling direct user modifications to preferences. This ensures consistent and controlled configurations across the organization.

3. Setting Limits on Favorites

To maintain optimal performance, administrators can define a maximum number of favorites users can add to their BI Launchpad. This prevents excessive resource consumption and enhances user experience.

4. Limiting Recent Viewed Documents

Administrators can also set a maximum number of recently viewed documents accessible in the BI Launchpad, optimizing application performance and ensuring clarity of the recent activity list.

These comprehensive updates significantly improve usability, security, and administrative control in the latest SAP BI Launchpad release, enabling a smoother, more efficient user experience.

entry.title: Depreciation Calculation Data action is taking longer time than expectation.
entry.content:
Hello,

Depreciation Calculation Data action is taking longer time than expectation. Even if we are reducing the timeframe, reducing the scoping for which it is running still it is taking longer time than expectation.

This is Code which is taking longer time

MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_DATE] = [d/GN_SS_VERSION].[p/Planning_From_Period] TO [d/GN_SS_VERSION].[p/Planning_To_Period]//-----10 Years of Time Frame
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("AMOUNT", "DEPRECIATION_PER_MONTH")
MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_DATASOURCE] = ("DS102", "DS103")
MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_ASSET_CLASSIFIED] = "AC002"//For New Asset
MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_INPUT_CURRENCY] = %Select_Currency%
MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_ACCOUNTGROUP] = ("S000035", "MNG180")
MEMBERSET [d/GN_S4_COCODE] = BASEMEMBER([d/GN_S4_COCODE].[h/Hierarchy], "All_Company")
MEMBERSET [d/GN_S4_ASSET] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/GN_S4_ASSETCLASS] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/GN_S4_COSTCENTER] = %Division%
MEMBERSET [d/GN_S4_PROFITCENTER] = BASEMEMBER([d/GN_S4_PROFITCENTER].[h/PC_HIERARCHY], %Profit_Center%)
MEMBERSET [d/GN_SS_ASSET_SUB_CLASS] = %Asset_SubClass%


INTEGER @ASSET_LIFE
INTEGER @start_COUNT
INTEGER @count
DELETE([d/Measures] = "DEPRECIATION_PER_MONTH", [d/GN_SS_ACCOUNTGROUP] = "MNG180", [d/GN_SS_DATASOURCE] = "DS103", [d/GN_SS_ASSET_CLASSIFIED] = "AC002")

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/GN_SS_ASSET_SUB_CLASS]
@ASSET_LIFE = ATTRIBUTE([d/GN_SS_ASSET_SUB_CLASS].[p/Useful_Life_In_Month])
@count = 120 //-----for 10 Years
FOREACH.BOOKED [d/GN_SS_DATE]
FOR @start_COUNT = 1 TO @count
DATA([d/Measures] = "DEPRECIATION_PER_MONTH", [d/GN_SS_ACCOUNTGROUP] = "MNG180", [d/GN_SS_DATASOURCE] = "DS103", [d/GN_SS_DATE] = NEXT(@START_COUNT)) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "AMOUNT", [d/GN_SS_ACCOUNTGROUP] = "S000035", [d/GN_SS_DATASOURCE] = "DS102") / @ASSET_LIFE
ENDFOR
ENDFOR
ENDFOR

Is there any room for performance improvement for the above code.

Thanks and Regards,

Arpit

entry.title: Express Document "Update Was Terminated" Received from author error in me22N while updating freight
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to edit PO (ME22N) but system is showing as error Express Document "Update Was Terminated" Received from author and if I press enter then all the data which updated has vanished/lost.

Update details:

we are trying to update the freight amount in the conditions tab but the same is giving this error.

1. error does not come if the PO is not released, or the freight value is less then 1000

2. we are getting runtime error CONVT_NO_NUMBER

Identifed the issue is due to mismatch of Data Types. Issue is occuring while tyring to convert "1,000.00" to a number."," Comma cannot be converted to a number. 

 

but the error is occuring in /1BCDWB/LSM00000012F01 there is no version for this code it is not custom neither are there any logs/version for this code/include.

Request you all please help me to resolve it.

Thanks !

Best Regards,

Kunj

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
a very nice blog.

there is also another way to filter Created event for delivery block via managed event and raise a custom event for specific delivery block reason value. Pay attention, during behavior definition extension we are not using I_SALESORDERTP interface:

 

1.Filter CDS for new custom event

@EndUserText.label: 'Sales Order Created With Filter'

@event: {

   description: 'Sales Order Created with FIlter',

   sapObjectNodeType: 'SalesOrder',

   implementedBy    : ['ABAP:RAP_EVENT']

}

@vdm.usage.type: [#EVENT_SIGNATURE]

define abstract entity ZZ_D_SALESORDERCREATEDFILTERED  {

           @event.raisedAt.dateTime: true

        EventRaisedDateTime               : vdm_lastchangedon;

        SO                                : vbeln;

        SOType                            : auart_unv;

        SalseOrganization                 : vkorg;

        DistributionChannel               : vtweg;

        OrganizationDivision              : spart;

        SoldToParty                       : kunnr;

/*        @event.context.attribute: ''     */

        DeliveryBlockReason               : lifsk; 

}

 

2 Parameter entity for managed Event

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Sales'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

    serviceQuality: #X,

    sizeCategory: #S,

    dataClass: #MIXED

}

define view entity ZZ_D_SalesOrderF as select from I_SalesOrder

{

    key SalesOrder,

        SalesOrderType,

        SalesOrganization,

        DistributionChannel,

        OrganizationDivision,

        SoldToParty,

        DeliveryBlockReason       // Filtering this field

 }

 

3. Behavior Definition Extension

     extension;

   // using interface I_SALESORDERTP;                --Not used for event Created visibility

    //

    // implementation in class zbp_salesordertp_event unique;  --Not used for global BD class

    //                                                         --instead we  have a global abstract

    //                                                         --class for Events zcl_so_event_handler

 

    extend behavior for SalesOrder

    {

    event Z_CreatedWithFilter parameter ZZ_D_SALESORDERCREATEDfiltered;   //Custom event

    managed event Z_Derived_Created on Created parameter ZZ_D_SalesOrderF;

 

    }

4. Global class for events

CLASS zcl_so_events_handler DEFINITION

  PUBLIC

  ABSTRACT                        "Abstract definition

  FINAL

  FOR EVENTS OF R_SalesOrderTP.   "Local class is defined

 

  PUBLIC SECTION.

  PROTECTED SECTION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

ENDCLASS.

 

 

 

CLASS zcl_so_events_handler IMPLEMENTATION.

ENDCLASS.

 

 

5. Local Class in (4)

CLASS lcl_so_events_handler DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_event_handler.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS filter_event_create FOR ENTITY EVENT created_instance FOR SalesOrder~Z_Derived_Created.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_so_events_handler IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD filter_event_create.

    cl_abap_tx=>save( ).

 

    IF created_instance IS NOT INITIAL.

      RAISE ENTITY EVENT R_SalesOrderTP~Z_CreatedWithFilter

        FROM VALUE #(

          FOR <so> IN created_instance (

            so = <so>-SalesOrder

            SOType = <so>-SalesOrderType

            SalseOrganization = <so>-SalesOrganization

            DistributionChannel = <so>-DistributionChannel

            SoldToParty = <so>-SoldToParty

            DeliveryBlockReason = <so>-DeliveryBlockReason   "Here we can have a filer value

          )

        ).

    ENDIF.

 

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: MRP and purchase requisition document type.
User Role Thresholds in LMS
entry.content:
Dear SF-LMS Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are currently reviewing our LMS system and have noticed that our company's LMS_GLOBAL_USER role has a total of 10,049 records, which includes both internal and external users. We would appreciate your guidance on the following:

  1. Is the current total of 10,049 users for the role within acceptable limits?
  2. What is the threshold or maximum number of users allowed per role in the system?
  3. Are there any potential performance or operational concerns we should be aware of with this number of users?
  4. Are there any best practices or recommendations related to user role management in the system that we should consider as a company?

Your expertise and insights would be greatly appreciated to ensure we are operating within optimal system parameters.

Thank you in advance for your support, and we look forward to your guidance.
SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Edgar-Pe ,

This normally happens when a third-party IDP, such as Azure Entra or OKTA, is used for authentication in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system. In your Cloud Identity Services, please maintain the same conditional authentication that you have set up for your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system. It should solve the double login issues. 

You can also check the guide here in Discovery Center mission https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/4538/4826/

check the chapter -  Prepare for the Joule activation section. 

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Currency of invoice is wrong when fetching a sales document from SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi dear community members,

I have problem with SAP Customer Checkout when I fetch unpaid A/R invoice from SAP Business One. In SAP Customer Checkout UZS is my main currency, but in SAP B1 national currency is USD and System Currency is UZS. While fetching invoice, SAP Customer Checkout shows document total in UZS currency, but DocTotal value is converted USD and shown in fetch display. How can I solve this problem? In common errors of SAP Customer Checkout with SAP B1 note, I have found https://me.sap.com/notes/2586361 about this problem, but it is removed unfortunately.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for Services: Find New Updates Regularly in your Service Results Report
entry.content:
Stay up to date with all the technical and administration updates to the SAP Cloud ALM for Service: Service Results Report, using the online SAP Companion Help Tool.

 

1. Click on the Open help  icon.

Use the built in help tool SAP Companion

 

2. Navigate to the What’s New section, using the loudspeaker icon.

The help menu shows the 'What's New' loudspeaker icon

 

3. You will see a number of the recent updates in the list, on the right
of the screen. I have selected two to show you in more detail.

 

Two examples of updates

 

4. Clicking into each entry gives a brief textual summary of the update. a. Highlights an
update that contains info on the font size in the PDF. b. Shows how to use the Presentation mode.

 

The expanded update with more detailed info

A second example of an expanded update

 

5. If you would like to see more background information on these updates, at
the top of the list there is a ‘See All’ Button.  

 

See all the updates in one view by clicking the 'See All' button to open the Help Portal

 

6. Clicking this brings you to the Help Portal with a
table that details all the new updates with screenshots. Here you can filter by date
to see the most recent ones or by area to find the most relevant to your needs.

 

The SAP Cloud ALM webpage portal with all the Developer updates and extra info for filtering

 

That's it for the first Service Results blog post.

Look forward to more updates like this, to help you navigate and optimize your SAP usage.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

  • Christine Watterson is a Software Engineer working on the Intelligent Service Delivery Hub (ISDH) team.  She has SAP Certification in Success Factors and now looks after the Universal Acceptance Testing (UAT) of new releases for Service Delivery.  She is also heavily involved in migrating services into production (Cloud ALM for Services).  Her favorite aspect of working with SAP is the global nature of her team, she gets to experience a wide variety of people and cultures daily. Her advice to someone new to the Service Results would be to get stuck into the tool straight away.  You can't break it, play around and investigate its features.  If you have any questions, please contact us, we are happy to help.  The tool has been upgraded in recent months and it's designed to make customer lives much easier.  

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @siobhanmurphy or @Christine Watterson .

entry.title: How do I use the migration tool?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Migrating to SAP Integration Suite learning journey.

Overview
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to migrate integration scenarios from SAP Process Orchestration / SAP Process Integration to SAP Integration Suite. 

Learning objectives
This learning journey provides guidance for integration developers to migrate from SAP Process Orchestration / SAP Process Integration to SAP Integration Suite.

Prerequisites

  • Experience creating iFlows with SAP Integration Suite

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit
